name: Takasago Thermal Engineering Co., Ltd.
summary: Takasago Thermal Engineering Co., Ltd. designs, constructs, manufactures, and installs HVAC systems in Japan and internationally. It also offers air conditioning, cleanrooms and associated systems, district heating and cooling facilities, plumbing and drainage, co-generation, electrical, automatic control, communication, equipment diagnosis/failure diagnosis, and dehumidifying/drying systems. In addition, the company provides HVAC systems for nuclear energy facilities, high precision HVAC systems, waste vacuum transfer facility, discharged-heat recovery systems, heating/cooling systems, refrigerating/freezing systems, and other types of environmental control and thermal engineering systems. Further, it is involved in coordination for construction work, labor dispatch business, security business, cleaning business, energy supply, power generation, and water treatment activities. The company engages in the purchase and sale, brokerage, lease, and management of real estate; business related to greenhouse gas emission rights trading; consulting services, energy saving, and environmental measures services; and manufacture, sale, import, and export of machinery, equipment, and various materials. The company was formerly known as Takasago Heating Works Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Takasago Thermal Engineering Co., Ltd. in 1943. Takasago Thermal Engineering Co., Ltd. was founded in 1923 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
